title: lorax-templates-rhel bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[10.1-3.0.1]
- Resolve Wayland issue with UEKR8 [Orabug: 37569575]
- Switch to UEKR8 kernel
- Remove gcom-firmware for aarch64
- Support kernel-ueknext for OL10 Developer Preview
- Do not install nmap-ncat or libreport-rhel-anaconda-bugzilla into runtime.
- Remove RHCK initrd from runtime image when creating the UEK
  boot ISO. (mark.will@oracle.com) [Orabug: 34085357]
- Dropped redhat-release-eula.
- Updated description and Summary.
- Set permissions under  to 555 [Orabug: 28945615]
- Allow to create UEK boot iso

[10.1-3]
- config_files: Do not remove chcon in runtime cleanup (ppolawsk)
  Resolves: RHEL-102872
- runtime-postinstall: allow pipewire to run as root (awilliam)
  Resolves: RHEL-102419
- runtime-cleanup: Do not clean up rpm binaries (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-101695

[10.1-2]
- Set ppc64le default boot to test the media (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-93171

[10.1-1]
- Bump release version to 10.1 (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-91929
- Add a boot menu for fips=1 (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-91929
full_text:
[10.1-3.0.1]
- Resolve Wayland issue with UEKR8 [Orabug: 37569575]
- Switch to UEKR8 kernel
- Remove gcom-firmware for aarch64
- Support kernel-ueknext for OL10 Developer Preview
- Do not install nmap-ncat or libreport-rhel-anaconda-bugzilla into runtime.
- Remove RHCK initrd from runtime image when creating the UEK
  boot ISO. (mark.will@oracle.com) [Orabug: 34085357]
- Dropped redhat-release-eula.
- Updated description and Summary.
- Set permissions under  to 555 [Orabug: 28945615]
- Allow to create UEK boot iso

[10.1-3]
- config_files: Do not remove chcon in runtime cleanup (ppolawsk)
  Resolves: RHEL-102872
- runtime-postinstall: allow pipewire to run as root (awilliam)
  Resolves: RHEL-102419
- runtime-cleanup: Do not clean up rpm binaries (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-101695

[10.1-2]
- Set ppc64le default boot to test the media (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-93171

[10.1-1]
- Bump release version to 10.1 (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-91929
- Add a boot menu for fips=1 (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-91929

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20384-0.html
